task.title: Accept 556 Services and Proceed to Phase 3
task.context: Service library import complete: 556 services in database. Batch deliverables initially specified 548, but research discovered 556 valid services. We accept 556 services as the final library. Update documentation to reflect 556 (not 548). Proceed to Phase 3 (Onboarding UI).
task.instructions:
## Task: Accept 556 Services and Prepare for Phase 3
### Step 1: Update Documentation
Update these files to reflect 556 services (not 548):
1. docs/research/batch1-progress.md - Update total: 548 → 556
2. docs/research/batch2-progress.md - Update total: 548 → 556
3. docs/research/batch3-progress.md - Update total: 548 → 556
4. docs/research/batch4-progress.md - Update total: 548 → 556
5. docs/research/batch5-progress.md - Update total: 548 → 556
6. docs/research/PHASE2_CHUNKED_IMPORT_PROGRESS.md - Update: "548 services" → "556 services" - Add note: "Research discovered 556 valid services"
7. docs/research/DISCREPANCY_INVESTIGATION_REPORT.md (if exists) - Update: "Expected: 548" → "Expected: 556" - Update: "Discrepancy: +8" → "No discrepancy — all services valid"
### Step 2: Create Phase 3 Readiness Doc
Create: docs/research/PRE_PHASE3_READINESS.md
Content: ```markdown # Phase 3 Readiness: Build Onboarding UI
## Database State
- Total Services: 556 ✓ - Industries: 19 ✓ - Categories: 104+ ✓ - Data Quality: Clean (no NULLs, no duplicates)
## Import Complete
Batch Progress: - Batch 1 (Exterior & Outdoor): 134 services ✓ - Batch 2 (Interior Trades): 119 services ✓ - Batch 3 (Essential Systems): 105 services ✓ - Batch 4 (Structural & Building): 92 services ✓ - Batch 5 (Specialized Services): 106 services ✓
Total: 556 services
## Regional Multipliers
- Northeast: ×1.15 - Southeast: ×0.92 - Southwest: ×1.025 - Midwest: ×1.00 (baseline) - Northwest: ×1.135
## Database Schema
Table: master_service_library
Columns: - service_name - service_category - industry - default_unit_type - midwest_cost - midwest_price - northeast_cost - northeast_price - southeast_cost - southeast_price - southwest_cost - southwest_price - northwest_cost - northwest_price - subcontracted_vendor_cost - subcontracted_client_price - service_type (inhouse_only, subcontracted_only, both) - frequency (weekly, bi_weekly, monthly, seasonal, on_demand) - is_common (boolean)
Indexes: - idx_master_service_library_service_category - idx_master_service_library_industry
## Status
✓ Phase 1 Complete: Industry Classification (19 industries) ✓ Phase 2 Complete: Service Library Research (556 services) ✓ Phase 3 Complete: Database Schema Update (multi-region columns) ✓ Phase 4 Complete: Import All Services (556 imported)
## Ready for Phase 3
Status: READY
Next Phase: Build Onboarding UI
Prerequisites Met: - [x] All 556 services imported - [x] Regional multipliers documented - [x] Database schema updated (multi-region columns) - [x] Documentation updated to reflect 556 - [x] Data quality verified ```
### Step 3: Push Changes to GitHub
Commit changes: ```bash git add docs/research/*.md git commit -m "Accept 556 services - update documentation (no discrepancy, all valid)" git push origin master ```
task.success_criteria: - All 6 documentation files updated (548 → 556) - PRE_PHASE3_READINESS.md created - Database state documented (556 services, 19 industries) - Batch progress updated (total 556) - Changes committed and pushed to GitHub - Clear path to Phase 3 (Onboarding UI)

phase.title: Build Onboarding UI
phase.prerequisites: All 556 services imported, documentation updated, database verified
